sourceTitle: Responsible Use of Generative AI in Research at HKU
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Accountability: Researchers are responsible for the outputs generated by GenAI and their implications. ... Limit Over-Reliance: Use GenAI as a support tool, not a substitute for critical analysis and human expertise.
evidenceLocator: General Principles - Accountability; Best Practices - Limit Over-Reliance
